subcodes.first_line: O Javád! Shouldst thou cleanse thy heart from attachment to this world and all that is therein, and with sanctified spirit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جواد اگر قلبت را از تعلق بدنیا و آنچه در او هست منزه نمائی و با نفس قدسی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
